briefdescription.para: VBAT Hibernate mode exit by VBUS connected.
Hibernate mode exit by SHPHLD button.
VBUS Hibernate mode exit by VBUS disconnected.
IBAT/VBAT battery current and/or voltage conversion ready.

detaileddescription.para: Do not wait for charge completion.
Do not wait for charge completion.
Do not wait for charge completion.

briefdescription.para: Identifies a set of events for the event callback.

detaileddescription.para: Intended to be checked against the NPM10XX_RSTREAS_* macros once retrieved.

memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *mfd_npm10xx_dev, struct mfd_npm10xx_event_callback *cb, npm10xx_event_t events)
memberdef.name: npm10xx_callback_handler_t

briefdescription.para: Define the application callback handler function signature.

detaileddescription.para:
mfd_npm10xx_dev
nPM10xx MFD device
cb
Original struct mfd_npm10xx_event_callback owning this handler
events
Mask of events that triggers the callback handler
Note: cb pointer can be used to retrieve private data through CONTAINER_OF() if original struct mfd_npm10xx_event_callback is stored in another private structure.
Turn off all supplies and apply internal reset. Clear all registers except reset registers.

briefdescription.para: Retrieve and clear the reset reason of the nPM10xx PMIC device.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the variable to write the reset reason into

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, enum mfd_npm10xx_hibernate_mode mode, k_timeout_t time)
memberdef.name: mfd_npm10xx_hibernate

briefdescription.para: Trigger a Hibernate mode on an nPM10xx PMIC device.

detaileddescription.para: This will turn off all supplies and any devices powered from them. The VBAT Hibernate mode is exited automatically when VBUS becomes present. The VBUS Hibernate mode is exited when VBUS is removed. The SHPHLD button can be configured to exit Hibernate modes as well. NOTE: currently only K_FOREVER timeout is supported.

parameterdescription.para: Timeout of the Hibernate mode. Use K_FOREVER to hibernate without a timeout.

briefdescription.para: Enter or exit a VBUS Standby mode on an nPM10xx PMIC device.

detaileddescription.para: VBUS Standby modes reduce quiescent current drawn from VBUS. The device exits these modes automatically when VBUS is no longer present.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, struct mfd_npm10xx_event_callback *callback, bool add)
memberdef.name: mfd_npm10xx_manage_callback

detaileddescription.para: On removal, when no callbacks handling a given event are left, the interrupts from this event will be disabled.

parameterdescription.para: A pointer to the callback to be added or removed from the list
Boolean indicating insertion or removal of the callback
